name: token_swap
description: Execute an optimal token swap across networks using LI.FI API integration

fromToken.description: The contract address of the token to swap from (e.g. 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913 for USDC on Base). Use 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 for native ETH.

toToken.description: The contract address of the token you want to receive.

amountStr.description: The amount to swap in standard units (e.g. '100' for 100 USDC).

fromChain.description: Source chain name or ID (e.g. 'base', '8453', 'eth', '1'). Defaults to base.

toChain.description: Destination chain name or ID (defaults to same as fromChain).
